summary: Backend testing completed for MLB Tail Risk Panel + Fragility Calibrator (Features 1-4). All 1426 pytest tests pass including 24 new tests for tail risk and fragility. Validated all contract requirements, specific scenarios (Yankees @ Guardians cases), and orchestrator integration. Pure Python PMF/CDF implementation confirmed (no scipy dependency).
passed_tests: All 1426 pytest tests pass (including 24 new tests in test_mlb_tail_risk_and_fragility.py)

Feature 1 - compute_tail_risk contract: all required fields present (available, market_line, mean, under_probability, over_probability, p_ge_12, p_ge_14, p_ge_16, tail_bucket, tail_risk_score, under_quality, interpretation_es, reason_codes)
Feature 1 - Probability constraint: under_probability + over_probability ≈ 1.0
Feature 1 - Monotonic tail probabilities: p_ge_12 >= p_ge_14 >= p_ge_16
Feature 1 - Tail bucket classification: LOW (<12%), MEDIUM (12-22%), HIGH (>22%), EXTREME (p_ge_14>15% OR p_ge_16>8%)
Feature 1 - Mandatory reason codes: TAIL_RISK_PANEL_USED and PURE_PYTHON_PMF_CDF_USED present
Feature 1 - Fail-soft behavior when distribution_payload unavailable

Feature 1 - Yankees @ Guardians case: mean ER 8.0, line 10.5, nb_ratio 1.35, traffic 55, series 50 → under_probability >= 0.55, under_quality = MEAN_SUPPORTED_BUT_TAIL_FRAGILE (NOT MEAN_AND_TAIL_SUPPORTED)
Feature 1 - Pure Python implementation: no scipy/numpy imports found in source code
Feature 3 - No hidden routes: delta=0, adjusted_fragility = base
Feature 3 - Both bullpens tired (usage_3d>=0.55 both): HOR_BOTH_BULLPENS_TIRED, delta >= 8
Feature 3 - Volatile starter (era>=4.50 OR whip>=1.35): HOR_MEDIOCRE_OR_VOLATILE_STARTER, delta >= 5
Feature 3 - Series familiarity (score>=40): HOR_SERIES_FAMILIARITY_ACTIVE, delta=5
Feature 3 - Late lambda elevated (λ_7_9 > 35% or highest): HOR_LATE_LAMBDA_ELEVATED, delta 5-8
Feature 3 - Tail risk present (p_ge_12 >= 0.12): HOR_TAIL_RISK_PRESENT, delta=5 (medium) or 10 (high)
Feature 3 - Traffic/defense risk (score>=55): HOR_TRAFFIC_RISK and HOR_DEFENSIVE_RISK routes
Feature 3 - Caps respected: max delta 20, ceiling 85, never decrements
Feature 3 - Market side preserved: never flips Over/Under polarity
Feature 3 - Yankees @ Guardians combined case: base_fragility=20 + both_bullpens (0.65/0.62) + volatile starter (era 4.92, whip 1.43) + series 45 → adjusted_fragility in range [28, 38]
Feature 4 - CLEAN_UNDER profile: tail bucket LOW + under_quality MEAN_AND_TAIL_SUPPORTED → RC_CLEAN_UNDER_PROFILE
Feature 4 - MEAN_SUPPORTED_FRAGILE_UNDER profile: under_quality MEAN_SUPPORTED_BUT_TAIL_FRAGILE → RC_PROTECTED_LINE_PREFERRED_DUE_TO_TAIL
Feature 4 - OVER_LIVES_THROUGH_TAIL profile: side=over + tail HIGH/EXTREME → RC_OVER_LIVES_THROUGH_TAIL
Integration - MLB Orchestrator: pick_payload['tail_risk'], pick_payload['market_profile'], pick_payload['fragility_calibration'] persist correctly
Integration - MLB Orchestrator: pipeline_meta['tail_risk'] and pipeline_meta['fragility_calibration'] contain expected summary fields
Integration - MLB Orchestrator: computed AFTER expected_runs_distribution and does NOT break existing endpoints

success_percentage.frontend: Not tested (already verified in iteration_68.json per main agent note)

Caps respected: max delta 20, ceiling 85, never decrements
pipeline_meta contains tail_risk and fragility_calibration summaries
No breaking changes to existing endpoints
